description: Managing EU/UK labelling, artwork & lifecycle submissions, variations, and cross-functional regulatory activities.
details: Lead end-to-end labelling and artwork lifecycle for EU/UK marketed products. Coordinate with QA, supply chain, and packaging teams. Author and review Type IA/IB/II variations, renewals, and PSUR/PADER submissions.

description: Prepared regulatory dossiers, managed post-approval changes, annual reports & PSUR/PADER submissions.
details: Compiled CTD/ACTD dossiers, drafted SmPC/PIL, and managed change control documentation. Liaised with health authorities for clarifications and deficiency responses.

description: Ensured cGMP compliance, reviewed artworks, performed samplings, change controls & deviation management.
details: Performed in-process and finished product release activities, batch record review, deviation/CAPA, and supported regulatory inspections.
